tool_calls_made.name: handoff_to_structured

arguments.reason: Venue found in Old Town with sufficient capacity and calculated costs within budget
arguments.context: Original request for Haymarket venue with 12 guests on 2026-04-25 at 19:30. No Haymarket venues available, but The Royal Oak in Old Town accommodates 16 guests. Total cost £972 (deposit £194) within £1000 budget.
